name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Provides ₹6,000 per year in three equal instalments directly to small and marginal farmers. No application fee, transferred directly to bank account.

name: National Scholarship Portal — Merit Scholarship
description: Financial support of up to ₹12,000 per year for students from low-income families pursuing higher education at any UGC-recognised institution.

name: National Scholarship Portal — SC Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matriculation education. Covers tuition fees and provides a maintenance allowance.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
description: Monthly pension of ₹200–₹500 for senior citizens living below the poverty line. No contribution required — it is a government-funded scheme.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
description: A pension scheme for senior citizens guaranteeing 7.4% annual return on a lump-sum investment, with monthly pension payouts for 10 years.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Zero-balance savings account with a free RuPay debit card, accident insurance of ₹2 lakh, and life cover of ₹30,000 for any Indian citizen.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana — Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Financial assistance of ₹1.2–₹1.3 lakh for rural households to build or upgrade a pucca house. Funds are transferred directly to the bank account.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A high-interest (8.2% p.a.) savings scheme for the girl child. Parents deposit yearly and the account matures when the girl turns 21, ideal for education or marriage expenses.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: A scheme promoting welfare, education, and survival of the girl child. Provides financial incentives and awareness support to families in identified districts.

name: Ayushman Bharat — Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalisation at empanelled public and private hospitals across India.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total disability at just ₹20 per year premium, available to all bank account holders.
documentsNeeded: Mobile number linked to bank account

name: Tamil Nadu State Scholarship for Higher Education
description: A Tamil Nadu state government grant supporting tuition costs for undergraduate students from economically weaker sections in state colleges.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Provides farmers with timely and adequate credit for agricultural needs at low interest rates (around 4% p.a.), covering crop loans, post-harvest expenses, and more.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh in case of death for any reason, at a premium of just ₹436 per year. Available to all savings bank account holders aged 18–50.
documentsNeeded: Mobile number linked to bank account

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana — National Rural Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NRLM)
description: Supports rural women by forming Self-Help Groups (SHGs), providing micro-credit, skill training, and linkage to financial institutions for income generation.

name: PM Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Provides financial assistance (15–35% subsidy on project cost) to individuals setting up micro-enterprises, creating self-employment opportunities in rural and urban areas.

name: Annapurna Scheme (Senior Citizen Food Security)
description: Provides 10 kg of free food grain per month to senior citizens who are not covered under the National Old Age Pension Scheme.
documentsNeeded: Proof of non-receipt of NOAPS pension

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme that compensates farmers for financial losses due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases. Farmers pay only 1.5–5% of the sum insured as premium.
